title: Ethiopian Nut Crumble
description: A sweet and crunchy Ethiopian-inspired dessert made with ground nuts and a crumbly topping. Perfect for warm weather.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together ground almonds, brown sugar, ground cinnamon, and ground cardamom.
In a separate bowl, mix crumbly oats and melted butter until well combined.
Add the crumbly oat mixture to the almond mixture and stir until a crumbly dough forms.
Press the dough into a 9-inch (23cm) round baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Cut into wedges and serve warm.
